scope: Additional technical terms encountered in translation installment 02 (Surat al-Baqarah).

terms.english: alphabet letters; the disjointed opening letters
terms.note: In this work the phrase refers to the isolated letter-openings at the beginnings of certain surahs.
Used here especially for the letter-openings such as alif lam mim and ha mim.
In this section the author uses it for the one-letter initials Sad, Qaf, and Nun.
A shorthand expression in the poem for openings such as alif lam ra' and alif lam mim ra'.
